Aider

Claude Code

Cline

Free

CodeRabbit

AI code review and PR summarization tool for GitHub/GitLab. Automatically generates review comments and change summaries.

Cody (Sourcegraph)

Freemium

Continue

Free

Cursor

Freemium

Cursor Composer

Paid
